info.title: Pause Wearable Feature
info.description: Data Cloud Ingestion API schema for flattened wearable-derived features (HRV / sleep / vasomotor) pushed by pause_ingest. Upload this when creating the Ingestion API data stream; it defines the `wearable_feature` object that becomes the Pause_Wearable_Feature DLO, mapped to the Pause_Wearable_Feature__dlm DMO the three Calculated Insights query.

record_id.description: Idempotency / primary key. Slot-stable (e.g. <contactId>:hrv_rmssd:d07) so re-pushing upserts in place and the window stays bounded.

unified_id.description: Salesforce Health Cloud Contact.Id — the join key into ssot__Individual__dlm.ssot__Id__c and the CI unified_id__c dimension.

observation_type.description: One of: hrv_rmssd | sleep_session | hot_flash | night_sweat. Each Calculated Insight filters on this.

effective_date.description: When the feature was observed (ISO-8601 with offset). Informational for display/recency; the window is owned by the push, not a SQL date filter.

value_num.description: Metric value; semantics depend on observation_type: RMSSD ms (hrv_rmssd), sleep-efficiency fraction 0-1 (sleep_session), or event severity 1-3 (hot_flash/night_sweat).

source.description: Provenance tag, e.g. dbdp-flirt, oura-sleep-staging, dbdp-thermoregulation.
